subject: History
chapter: Weavers, Iron Smelters and Factory Owners

activities_projects.title: Who Are Weavers?
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning of weaving and the role of weavers
steps: Write the meaning of the word 'weaver'
List two products made by weavers
Write one sentence about their importance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the basic concept of weaving

activities_projects.title: Important Terms Match
activities_projects.objective: Learn key terms from the chapter
steps: Write terms like Weaver, Smelter, and Factory
Write their meanings from the chapter
Match each term with the correct meaning

activities_projects.title: Traditional Weaving Observation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how cloth was made traditionally
steps: Read about how Indian weavers made cloth
Write three steps involved in making cloth
Explain one step briefly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the process of weaving

activities_projects.title: Picture Observation
steps: Look at a picture of a loom or weaving process
Write what you observe in the picture
Write what work the person is doing

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect – Decline of Weavers
activities_projects.objective: Understand why many weavers lost their work
steps: Read about the arrival of machine-made cloth
Write one cause of the decline of weavers
Write one effect on their livelihood
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the impact of industrialization

activities_projects.title: List of Weaving Centers
activities_projects.objective: Identify important weaving centers in India
steps: Read the chapter and find names of weaving centers
Write at least three places
Write one line about each place
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about traditional weaving locations

activities_projects.title: Simple Timeline
activities_projects.objective: Understand changes in weaving over time
steps: Write events such as traditional weaving and factory production
Arrange them in order of time
Draw a small timeline
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand historical change in industries

activities_projects.title: Short Paragraph Writing
steps: Write a short paragraph about Indian weavers
Explain the work they did
Mention one challenge they faced

activities_projects.title: Iron Smelters Introduction
activities_projects.objective: Understand the work of iron smelters
steps: Read about iron smelters in the chapter
Write what work they did
Write one problem they faced
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about traditional iron production

activities_projects.title: Young Historian Poster
steps: Draw a poster showing a weaver working on a loom
Add short captions explaining the process
Present the poster in class
